title: VexJoy Agent
subtitle: An enforcement-first toolkit for AI coding agents that won't skip steps.

title: AI agents skip steps.
lead: "Looks correct" replaces running the tests. "Trivial change" replaces verification. The agent confidently ships broken code because nothing structurally prevented it from skipping the work.
callout: The failure mode isn't capability — it's compliance. Models are smart enough to write good code and motivated enough to skip the boring parts that prove it works.

title: Make skipping impossible.
lead: Behavior is enforced by structure, not by prompts. Hooks fire automatically. Gates require evidence. Skills encode counter-arguments at every skip-worthy step.

bullets.text: carry domain knowledge — Go idioms, K8s failure modes, voice profiles.
enforce phased methodology with exit criteria.
intercept lifecycle events and block incomplete work.
handle deterministic operations without LLM judgment.

title: By the numbers.
callout: Coverage spans Go, Python, Kubernetes, frontend, content, research, voice, infrastructure — and grows weekly through a closed-loop evolution pipeline.

layers.name: Agents
layers.desc: Domain knowledge — idiom tables, failure-mode catalogs, error-to-fix mappings.

layers.name: Skills
layers.desc: Phased methodology with gates. Each phase has exit criteria requiring evidence.

layers.name: Hooks
layers.desc: Fire on lifecycle events. Block incomplete work. Zero LLM cost.

layers.name: Scripts
layers.desc: Determinism — test runners, linters, validators. No LLM judgment.

title: One sentence in. Verified work out.
pipeline_caption: The router reads intent, picks the right domain agent paired with a methodology skill, and runs the full lifecycle. The user types one sentence. The system handles routing, planning, execution, verification, delivery, and learning.

title: What it looks like.
code:
$ claude

> /do debug this Go test

  Routing: go-engineer + systematic-debugging
  Phase 1/4: Reproduce — running test, capturing failure...
  Phase 2/4: Hypothesize — 3 candidates from stack trace...
  Phase 3/4: Verify — isolated root cause in connection pool timeout
  Phase 4/4: Fix — patch applied, test passing, PR opened

  ✓ Delivered: PR #847, fix connection pool timeout in health check

title: Anti-rationalization.

rows.text: Exit gate requires test output. Blocked.
Gate demands an exit code, not an assertion.

intro: This is the single thing that separates the toolkit from "an agent with a system prompt."

outcomes.heading: Higher trust in AI output
outcomes.body: Verified work, not assertions. Reviewers spend time on design, not chasing skipped tests.

outcomes.heading: Lower review burden
outcomes.body: Gates catch the failures that would otherwise reach a human reviewer. PRs land closer to ready.

outcomes.heading: Captured tribal knowledge
outcomes.body: Each agent encodes one engineer's hard-won knowledge into reusable workflows for the whole team.

outcomes.heading: Compounding leverage
outcomes.body: Closed-loop evolution — the toolkit observes failures, proposes new skills, tests them, integrates.

outcomes.heading: Reduced context cost
outcomes.body: Domain knowledge loads on demand. Token-saving mode strips boilerplate the toolkit already covers.

outcomes.heading: Auditable execution
outcomes.body: Every phase produces an artifact. Every gate produces an exit code. Decisions are traceable.

title: One toolkit, every CLI.
callout: Engineers pick the CLI that fits the task. The toolkit follows.

left.title: One toolkit, every CLI.
left.lead: Install once. Mirrors agents, skills, and hooks into every supported CLI. Choice of model is no longer locked to a knowledge base.
left.callout: Engineers pick the CLI that fits the task. The toolkit follows.

title: Where AI usually goes wrong — and how this stops it.
Most AI tooling asks the model to be careful. This toolkit makes carelessness structurally impossible.
subtitle: Production-grade AI coding requires more than a smart model. It requires the gates, evidence, and enforcement that turn capability into reliability.
accent_text: This toolkit makes carelessness structurally impossible.
